svg.title: NAPT Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from input image through text detection, recognition, glyph-to-electrode mapping, and neural stimulation output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of input images does NAPT handle? What are the challenges with degraded or low-visibility scenes?')
sendPrompt('How does EAST text detection work and why was it chosen for NAPT?')
sendPrompt('How does TrOCR handle degraded or low-visibility text? How does it differ from standard OCR?')
sendPrompt('Explain the glyph-to-electrode mapping in NAPT. How does it encode character geometry into electrode activation patterns?')
sendPrompt('What does the electrode activation array look like? How is spatial encoding preserved?')
sendPrompt('How is the neural stimulation signal delivered? What types of cortical or retinal prosthetics is NAPT targeting?')

svg.text: Legend — click any stage to explore
Tech stack labels shown on left margin
